core_question: Which insurance panels should I apply to first, and in what order, to maximize revenue in my first year of private practice?

patterns.quote: I have no idea which panels are even worth applying to in my state
I spent 6 hours on CAQH and still don't know if I did it right
My application was rejected and I lost 3 months of potential insurance revenue

current_workarounds: Ask colleagues who may have outdated information
Call insurance companies directly (hours of hold time)
time_wasted: 3-6 hours per panel application, plus 60-90 day wait times
money_risked: $5,000-$10,000 in delayed revenue per rejected application
emotional_state: Anxious about compliance errors, overwhelmed by bureaucracy, frustrated by lack of clear guidance
ideal_solution_language: Step-by-step guide that tells me exactly what to do, in what order, with no gaps
